title: 凉城的博客
subTitle: 岂能尽如人意 但求无愧我心
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){const hitokotoUrl='https://v1.hitokoto.cn/?c=i';const footerSelectors=['.footer-inner','footer','.site-footer','.footer'];let footerElem=null;for(const sel of footerSelectors){footerElem=document.querySelector(sel);if(footerElem)break;}if(footerElem){fetch(hitokotoUrl).then(response=>response.json()).then(data=>{const hitokotoText=data.hitokoto+' —— '+data.from;const hitokotoDiv=document.createElement('div');hitokotoDiv.style.marginBottom='8px';hitokotoDiv.style.fontStyle='italic';hitokotoDiv.textContent=hitokotoText;footerElem.insertBefore(hitokotoDiv,footerElem.firstChild);}).catch(error=>{console.error('获取一言失败:',error);});}});</script>
